title: Cancer care interventions for forcibly displaced populations in low- and middle-income countries of the Middle East and North African region affected by humanitarian crises: Protocol for a scoping review
author: Havlik, Anne
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the scoping review protocol document for the project titled "Cancer care interventions for forcibly displaced populations in low- and middle-income countries of the Arab world affected by humanitarian crises: protocol for a scoping review." The scoping review protocol is based on the "JBI Scoping Review Protocol Template." This is an  a priori  protocol of a scoping review. The protocol is available here with open access, ensuring transparency of our methodology, as prescribed by scoping review guidelines. Updated from DOI: 0.5281/zenodo.14633092
